description: A registered capture-stack version, referenced by id from each episode — CONTRACT §3.1, B-9.

capture_stack_id.description: The capture-stack identity (the anchor; RESOLVED AT INGEST from kit_id+components+timestamp, then referenced from the episode — NOT carried on the card).

modality.description: Capture modality (domain-closed hard enum; umi today, teleop slots in with no schema break).

version.description: Stack version (a firmware/hw change is a new version; resolvable as-of, B-8).
